ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the state in square miles */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "state_abbreviation" TEXT /* Two-letter abbreviation of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accident_data" (
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accident data entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the accident */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the accident */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the accident */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions at the time of the accident */,
  "road_conditions" TEXT /* Road conditions at the time of the accident */,
  "number_of_vehicles_involved" INTEGER /* Number of vehicles involved in the accident */,
  "drivers_involved" REAL /* Number of drivers involved in fatal collisions per billion miles */,
  "speeding_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of drivers involved in fatal collisions who were speeding */,
  "alcohol_impaired_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of drivers involved in fatal collisions who were alcohol-impaired */,
  "distracted_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of drivers involved in fatal collisions who were not distracted */,
  "previous_accidents_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of drivers involved in fatal collisions who had not been involved in any previous accidents */,
  "injuries" INTEGER /* Number of injuries resulting from the accident */,
  "fatalities" INTEGER /* Number of fatalities resulting from the accident */,
  "cause_of_accident" TEXT /* Primary cause of the accident */,
  "accident_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the accident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accident_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "insurance_data" (
  "insurance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insurance data entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "coverage_type" TEXT /* Type of insurance coverage */,
  "deductible" REAL /* Deductible amount for the insurance policy */,
  "number_of_claims" INTEGER /* Number of claims made in the state */,
  "total_claim_amount" REAL /* Total amount of claims in the state */,
  "claim_frequency" REAL /* Frequency of claims per insured driver */,
  "premiums" REAL /* Average car insurance premiums ($) in the state */,
  "losses" REAL /* Average losses incurred by insurance companies for collisions per insured driver ($) in the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("insurance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_insurance_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the platform */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the platform */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytical result */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "drivers_involved" REAL /* Number of drivers involved in fatal collisions per billion miles */,
  "speeding_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of drivers involved in fatal collisions who were speeding */,
  "alcohol_impaired_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of drivers involved in fatal collisions who were alcohol-impaired */,
  "distracted_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of drivers involved in fatal collisions who were not distracted */,
  "previous_accidents_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of drivers involved in fatal collisions who had not been involved in any previous accidents */,
  "premiums" REAL /* Average car insurance premiums ($) in the state */,
  "losses" REAL /* Average losses incurred by insurance companies for collisions per insured driver ($) in the state */,
  "total_injuries" INTEGER /* Total number of injuries in the state */,
  "total_fatalities" INTEGER /* Total number of fatalities in the state */,
  "average_injury_severity" REAL /* Average severity of injuries */,
  "average_fatality_severity" REAL /* Average severity of fatalities */,
  "claim_frequency" REAL /* Frequency of claims per insured driver */,
  "total_claim_amount" REAL /* Total amount of claims in the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_drivers_involved FOREIGN KEY ("drivers_involved") REFERENCES accident_data ("drivers_involved"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_premiums FOREIGN KEY ("premiums") REFERENCES insurance_data ("premiums"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_losses FOREIGN KEY ("losses") REFERENCES insurance_data ("losses")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analytical result the report is based on */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., weekly, monthly, yearly) */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "report_details" TEXT /* Detailed content of the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_analytics_id FOREIGN KEY ("analytics_id") REFERENCES analytics ("analytics_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., view, download, edit) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statesMetaData" (
  "meta_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state */,
  "meta_key" TEXT /* Metadata key */,
  "meta_value" TEXT /* Metadata value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meta_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statesMetaData_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_info" (
  "dataset_info_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "dataset_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "dataset_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "dataset_version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was last updated */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Data quality score (e.g., 0.0 to 1.0) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_info_id")
)
